MORE..

clusters.title: CoPF says $ 2.5 m stolen via 10 transactions, ignoring red flags

versions.title: CoPF says $ 2.5 m stolen via 10 transactions, ignoring red flags
versions.deck: Treasury Secretary Dr. Harshana Suriyapperuma appeared before the Committee on Public Finance (CoPF) yesterday, reversing an earlier refusal to attend, as lawmakers were told that 10 Government debt repayment transactions totalling $ 2.5 million had been diverted over four months.

clusters.title: Planters seek urgent response to stabilise tea production, key export markets

versions.title: Planters seek urgent response to stabilise tea production, key export markets

clusters.title: Sri Lanka - A second bite at the cherry

versions.title: Sri Lanka - A second bite at the cherry

versions.title: Ranasinghe Premadasa: A milestone in turning point of Malayaha Tamils’ lives

clusters.title: Eran outlines plans for resuscitating Sri Lanka Cricket
